name: Lyra
tagline: Your MCP agents, visualized. Control 2,700+ agents from one dashboard.
description: Visual command center for MCP agent orchestration. Connect to MCP clients, monitor running agents in real-time, execute tool calls, and track token usage from a sleek dashboard.
features: MCP server connection manager with auth support
Real-time agent cluster view with status indicators
Tool runner with JSON parameter input and live responses
Token usage tracking with visual counters
Aggregated log stream with level filtering
Demo agents pre-loaded for instant preview
target_audience: AI developers, agent orchestrators, DevOps teams managing MCP-powered workflows
use_cases: Monitor multiple MCP agents from single dashboard
Track token usage across agent clusters
Demo MCP client capabilities to stakeholders
